patches_modified.name: AMOLED dark theme
patches_modified.description: Makes the dark theme fully pure-black (AMOLED): backgrounds and surfaces/cards/bars become #000000. Dark mode only; borders, dividers and branded fills are kept for readability.

patches_modified.name: Block listings
patches_modified.description: Hides Avito offers from blacklisted adverts or sellers and adds a blacklist manager (import/export compatible with the Ave Blacklist extension).

patches_modified.name: Disable telemetry
patches_modified.description: Disables Avito first-party clickstream analytics and Avito's direct Adjust telemetry wrapper.

patches_modified.name: Disable update prompts
patches_modified.description: Prevents Avito's force-update screen opener from launching update screens. Toggleable in Настройки Morphe.

patches_modified.name: Morphe settings
patches_modified.description: Adds a "Настройки Morphe" entry to Avito's settings that hosts the configuration for the other Morphe patches.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Disables Avito ads by removing ad SDK entry points and short-circuiting commercial banner loading.

patches_modified.name: UI tweaks
patches_modified.description: Optional interface tweaks, each toggleable in Настройки Morphe: single-row home categories, hide the "Подписки" tab in Избранное, hide installments (Рассрочка) and the "Спросите у продавца" block on offers, expand descriptions by default (no "Читать далее"), and hide the Avi assistant tab in the bottom navigation.

patches_modified.name: Bypass anti-tamper
patches_modified.description: Stubs TBank's native RASP executor calls and neutralizes tamper flag reporting.

patches_modified.name: Remove TBank ads
patches_modified.description: Removes TBank stories and promotional surfaces.

patches_modified.name: Remove Wildberries ads
patches_modified.description: Removes Wildberries home banners, grid banners, promo headers, product recommendations, and lottery popups.

patches_modified.name: Remove Ozon ads
patches_modified.description: Removes Ozon ad widgets, banner carousels, video ads, and PDP promo blocks.

patches_modified.name: Remove delay
patches_modified.description: Removes the imposed delay when changing VPN servers.

patches_modified.name: Unlock LAN connections
patches_modified.description: Enables the LAN connections feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

patches_modified.name: Unlock custom DNS
patches_modified.description: Enables the custom DNS feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

patches_modified.name: Unlock split tunneling
patches_modified.description: Enables the split tunneling feature usually locked behind the Proton Plus paywall.

patches_added.name: Block update nag
patches_added.description: Blocks the nag that forces a required update from the Play Store.

patches_added.name: Spoof device id
patches_added.description: Replaces the device id JioHotstar derives from Settings.Secure ANDROID_ID with a stable-per-install random UUID, so the re-signed build presents as a device the server has never flagged. This is the verified single source of both the X-HS-Device-Id request header and the /v2/start body device ids; ANDROID_ID otherwise survives an app-data clear (it is keyed to the signing key), which is why a flagged device kept getting the "device logged out / suspicious activity" page on every launch. The id is persisted, and regenerates on an app-data clear so a re-flagged device can be rotated. NOTE: the server also sees the connection IP — pair this with a clean (ideally residential) India IP; a flagged exit IP is not something the client can change. Do not run on an account you cannot afford to lose.

patches_added.name: Theme
patches_added.description: Applies either amoled or material you theme for Instagram at patch time. [default = material you]

patches_removed.name: Amoled theme
patches_removed.description: Replaces Instagram's dark-mode background greys with pure black for AMOLED displays.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Pro
patches_modified.description: Unlocks 1Tap Cleaner PRO features: history export, app-group filters, unlimited cache targets, and ad removal.

patches_removed.name: Sanitize share links
patches_removed.description: Strips tracking parameters from copied/shared Amazon links, leaving only the clean product URL.

patches_modified.name: Dark mode
patches_modified.description: Force dark mode for Amazon Shopping.

patches_modified.name: Disable search suggestions tracking
patches_modified.description: Prevents search keypress and focus events from being sent with suggestion requests.

patches_modified.name: Disable video autoplay
patches_modified.description: Prevents product and ad videos from autoplaying.

patches_modified.name: Fix Amazon manifest conflicts
patches_modified.description: Updates shared Amazon permissions so other Amazon apps can coexist.

patches_modified.name: Hide Rufus tab
patches_modified.description: Removes the Rufus AI assistant tab from Amazon's bottom navigation bar.

patches_modified.name: Open links in browser
patches_modified.description: Opens non-Amazon URLs in the default browser instead of the in-app WebView.

patches_modified.name: Price history charts
patches_modified.description: Injects Keepa and CamelCamelCamel price history charts on Amazon product pages.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Hides sponsored and ad content in Amazon Shopping via CSS injection.

patches_modified.name: Remove Watermark
patches_modified.description: Removes watermarks from Canva exports and previews.

patches_modified.description: Forces Clue Plus subscription active, unlocking all premium features.

patches_added.name: TradingView Unlock Premium
patches_added.description: Unlocks Ultimate plan features, disables all paywalls and upgrade dialogs, suppresses payment-banned blocking errors, and grants access to all benefits including bar replay, custom intervals, multiple charts, study-on-study, server-side alerts, and ad-free charts.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Moovit+
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Moovit+

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all Wavve Boating GPS premium features: charts, weather, tide data, and removes subscription paywall.

patches_modified.name: Alert Distances
patches_modified.description:
Configures radar/camera and hazard alert announcement distances.
Writes all key variants (truncated _ + underscore + space) for resilience across versions.
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.
Official → default values (metres):
Accident 600→2000 | Alert 600→1000 | Police 600→1000 |
Freeways 2000→1200 | Highways 1000→900 | Streets 500→700 |
Hazard 600→500 | Heavy Traffic 600→3000 | Between Alerts 300→200

patches_modified.name: AutoZoom
patches_modified.description:
Controls how aggressively the map zooms in/out based on driving speed.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod (Speed Factor 20, Gradient Speed Threshold 60).

patches_modified.name: Disable Advil Ad Requests
patches_modified.description: Stubs AdvilRequest.getPageUrl() → "" so the Advil ad server receives no page URL and returns no ad content. Target: Lcom/waze/jni/protos/AdvilRequest;->getPageUrl() in classes6.dex (verified ✓).

patches_modified.name: Enlarged Speedometer
patches_modified.description:
Increases speedometer digit size for better readability.
Default: speed < 100 → 28sp (orig 20sp), speed ≥ 100 → 21sp (orig 13sp).
Target: Lcom/waze/main_screen/h/b/d;->f() in classes6.dex (verified ✓).
Note: the two const/16 values are non-consecutive (goto between them) — scanned independently.

patches_modified.name: Map Skin (Vitamin C)
patches_modified.description:
Applies Chuppito's 'Vitamin C' map skin. All visual values configurable.
• Night: true black AMOLED background (saves battery, prevents burn-in)
• Day: warm beige background
• Larger font labels across the board
• Wider navigation arrow head for better visibility
• Custom car 3D models: Batmobile, Riddler, race car, 3D arrow
Note: skin changes require a fresh APK install; updating an existing patched install may keep cached skin files.
Credits: ALEX02-GTT (skin design), Waze Chuppito Mod (integration).

patches_modified.name: Navigation & Map
patches_modified.description:
Configures navigation and map behaviour:
• Nearing destination distance (Credits: CGE Mod)
• Android Auto head-up alert distances
• Map turn mode (auto-zoom to upcoming turn)
• Traffic bar minimum time threshold
• GPS icon visibility
• Route notifications (hazard, school zone) — both disabled by default
Credits: Waze CGE Mod (nearing destination), Waze Chuppito (remaining keys).

patches_modified.name: Popup Suppression
patches_modified.description:
Prevents promotional and ad popups from appearing while driving.
Raises the minimum trigger speed to a near-impossible value so popups never appear.
Writes both Popup_ and Popu__ key variants for version resilience.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod.

patches_modified.name: Radar Sound (Any Speed)
patches_modified.description:
Plays radar/speed camera sound alerts regardless of current speed. Official Waze only alerts when over the speed limit.
Patches CONFIG_VALUE_ALERTS_PLAY_SPEED_CAMERA_SOUND_BELOW_SPEED_LIMIT (ordinal 632) via setConfigValueBoolNTV on every server config sync.
Target: Lcom/waze/ConfigManager;->onConfigSyncedFromServer() in classes5.dex (verified ✓).

patches_modified.name: Report Speed Limit
patches_modified.description:
Adds a Report option when tapping the speedometer to report wrong or missing speed limits. Not available in the official version.
Key: Map.Speedometer report speed enable_: 1

patches_modified.name: Speed Limit Sign
patches_modified.description:
Sets the speed limit sign style shown on the map.
• us (default) — large circular US-style sign, more readable at a glance
• metric — smaller local-style sign
Key: Map.Speedometer sign style

patches_modified.name: Uncensored Radar / Camera Display
patches_modified.description:
Shows exact fixed and mobile speed camera locations, including those not yet in the official Waze radar zone. Enables enforcement alerts via preferences keys:
Alerts.Enable Enforcement Alert_ / Alert / Polic_ (truncated + full variants).
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.
